concept: Celebration / An Open Light for the Collective
description: A joyful social gathering to mark a special occasion or honor an achievement. It is an expression of collective happiness and appreciation.
rationale: A composition of the established roots 'we' (the collective), 'li' (light, illumination), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'an open light for the collective,' framing celebration as a moment of shared joy and radiance for the community. The vowel pair 'i.a' creates a bright, uplifting sound.
